title: Failure to use a verilator to find the different depth levels of signals used in a circuit
body:
I am now trying to read the deep signals of the circuit without using vpi first. But I have some problems, in my sim.cpp I am reading 024root.h (located in obj_dir) and I want to apply the signals declared in the structure in class Vaes_128__024root in my sim.cpp, but when I use the option --public or not, still some of the signals are not found.
Is it possible that I am looking for the wrong corresponding class.

Environment:
- Verilator version: [Verilator 5.026 2024-06-15 rev v5.026]
- Operating System: [VMware-CentOS 7]
- Design files type: [verilog]
- Command line used: [verilator -f filelist --cc --exe --trace --build -j --top-module aes_128 --public]
